creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
Which OS version are you trying?

I've ugraded one box to 10.2, and the problem has gone.
The box that is on 10.1-RELEASE-p16 still shows the error:

# pkg install a2ps
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up-to-date.
All repositories are up-to-date.
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
The following 1 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        a2ps: 4.13b_6

The process will require 3 MiB more space.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
[1/1] Installing a2ps-4.13b_6...
[1/1] Extracting a2ps-4.13b_6: 100%
# exit
$ rehash 
$ a2ps /etc/motd > z.ps
a2ps: unknown medium `libpaper'
$ freebsd-version -ku
10.1-RELEASE-p16
10.1-RELEASE-p17
